proof_mode SNAPSHOT|INDIVIDUAL_RECONFIRM with required snapshot_id|reconfirmed_at. Residual: does not verify snapshot is 'completo' or 'mais recente' — only presence of id/timestamp

ranking forced into GO|REVIEW|NO_GO; fixture produces GO and NO_GO; REVIEW path when mixed fav/risk
CLIENT_LABEL maps GO→PARTICIPAR, NO_GO→NÃO PARTICIPAR, REVIEW→REVIEW; client_label always equals map
fatores_favoraveis list always present (may be empty when no fav factors, e.g. E-002)
referencias_oficiais from official_url / documento_oficial / status_source; non-empty required by audit for included recs
shared DISCLAIMER on every recommendation; claims_forbidden includes victory promise and substitute final analysis

honesty_assessment.justification: fixture_candidates use Prefeitura Demo / Câmara Demo synthetic editais. EVIDENCE.md residual: live DSN empty. claims_forbidden includes closed-as-open and victory promise.
overclaim_risks: Flipping DoD [x] without residual narrative could overclaim live open-edital recommendations from empty DSN
snapshot_id presence may be mistaken for verified complete latest snapshot
profile stamp may imply full hard_blocks enforcement that is only partial

issues.description: deliverable_e_editais has no DSN/live command path. Cannot produce real open-edital recommendations from PostgreSQL/PNCP until wired + open proof data present.
issues.recommendation: Follow-up: add live/from-dsn (or from opportunity_intel snapshot) command that maps proven-open candidates into recommend(); keep fail-closed when empty (EMPTY, no invent).

issues.description: DoD requires edital seen in complete latest snapshot or individual reconfirm. Implementation only requires snapshot_id string presence (or reconfirmed_at), without joining snapshot ledger / completeness / recency checks.
issues.recommendation: When live path ships, require snapshot_id ∈ latest complete snapshot set or force INDIVIDUAL_RECONFIRM with timestamped reconfirm evidence.

issues.description: extra.yaml hard_blocks include require_within_radius and require_future_deadline; score_against_profile does not apply them. Only require_official_url + exclude_terminal_or_suspended partially covered.
issues.recommendation: Apply remaining hard_blocks in scoring (or document stamp-only until live scoring engine reuses opportunity ranking weights).

issues.description: prove_open: terminal status (CANCELADA etc.) is excluded only when is_open is falsy. Explicit is_open=True with terminal status can still pass openness proof.
issues.recommendation: Fail-closed: if status ∈ terminal set, return None regardless of is_open flag (or require both consistent).

residual_risks: Live path not wired to DSN — mechanism proven on fixture only; real open editais require snapshot/reconfirm wiring + data
snapshot_id is presence-only, not completeness/recency proof
Profile hard_blocks only partially applied in scoring
is_open=True can override terminal status in prove_open
Fixture editais are synthetic (schema proof), not live market

may_flip_dod_conditions: PO accepts residual LIVE-PATH-NOT-WIRED + SNAPSHOT-ID-NOT-COMPLETENESS (mechanism claim, not live open-edital market population claim)
Flip narrative must state fixture/schema proof + fail-closed openness/disclaimer rules; must NOT claim live SC open editais GO/NO_GO from PG
Optional: keep L249-250 open until live snapshot join if PO wants operational open proof before [x]
gate_decision.reason: All 9 DoD E audit checks PASS on fixture; closed editais excluded; SNAPSHOT requires snapshot_id; INDIVIDUAL_RECONFIRM requires reconfirmed_at; GO/REVIEW/NO_GO + client labels; factors + official refs; disclaimer forbids victory and final-analysis substitute; tests map 1:1; process order correct (DoD unchecked, qa_verdict PENDING before independent QA). Residuals (live DSN, snapshot completeness, partial hard_blocks) are documented honesty debt, not AC failures of the mechanism slice.
gate_decision.po_guidance: Authorized to flip L249-257 with residual narrative OR defer flip until live path + snapshot completeness. Do not claim live open editais from empty DSN. QA did not flip DoD.
gate_decision.recommended_dod_action: PO decision: flip with residual LIVE-PATH-NOT-WIRED + SNAPSHOT-ID-NOT-COMPLETENESS notes, or leave open until DSN/snapshot path ships
